focus: Extract opus-fable-mode governor, re-injection, and measurement mechanisms.

label: Opus-fable-mode source architecture is setpoint, thermostat, measurement.
Governor controls recursion, armor hedging, reversible commitment, and outcome over visible process.
UserPromptSubmit re-injection counters context decay and must be injected separately for subagents.
The source hook install shape matches existing Public prompt-time hook vocabulary.
Measurement metrics are median words, tool:text ratio, caveat percentage, and self-opener percentage.
Prompts can steer working style but not capability ceiling.

reason: The source explicitly rejects capability-ceiling claims.
